lesson.text: Tommy stepped off the bus and looked around the bustling station. He clutched his backpack tightly, feeling a mix of excitement and nervousness. Who stepped off the bus?

translations.Somali: Tommy wuxuu ka degay baska oo fiiriyey saldhigga mashquulka badan. Wuxuu si adag u qabsaday boorsadiisa dhabarka, isagoo dareemaya isku dhafka farxadda iyo welwelka. Yaa ka degay baska?

lesson.text: Yes, Tommy, Tommy stepped off the bus. He took a deep breath, absorbing the unfamiliar sights and sounds of the station. As he walked towards his grandmother, his nervousness began to fade, replaced by a warm sense of belonging. She enveloped him in a tight hug, whispering, 'Welcome home, Tommy.' How was Tommy feeling now?

translations.Somali: Haa, Tommy, Tommy ayaa ka degay baska. Wuxuu si qoto dheer u neefsanayey, isagoo la qabsanaaya muuqaalada iyo codadka aan caadiga ahayn ee saldhigga. Markii uu u socday ayeeyadiis, welwelkiisii wuxuu bilaabay inuu yaraado, iyadoo lagu bedelayo dareen diirran oo ah inuu gurigiisii joogo. Waxay ku duubtay isku duubni xoog leh, iyadoo si hoose ugu fadhida, 'Ku soo dhowow guriga, Tommy.' Sidee ayuu Tommy hadda dareemayaa?

lesson.text: Warmth and a sense of belonging - that's right. However, Tommy wasn't staying long. He was just passing through on his way to a summer camp nestled in the mountains. His adventure was only beginning, and this stop was just the first step on his exciting journey. Where was Tommy heading to?

translations.Somali: Diirimaad iyo dareen ka mid noqosho - waa sax. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Tommy ma joogin muddo dheer. Wuxuu ahaa mid maraya isaga oo u socda xero xagaaga oo ku taal buuraleyda. Safarkiisa xiisaha badan wuxuu hadda bilaabanayey, waxaana joogistan ahayd tallaabadii ugu horreysay ee safarkiisa xiisaha badan. Halkee ayuu Tommy ku wajahnaa?

lesson.text: To a summer camp. Tommy was on his way to a summer camp. After meeting his grandmother, Tommy was now looking for a new bus ticket. Why was he looking for a new bus ticket though?

translations.Somali: Xero xagaaga. Tommy wuxuu ku wajahnaa xero xagaaga. Ka dib markuu la kulmay ayeeyadiis, Tommy wuxuu hadda raadinayaa tigidh cusub oo bas. Laakiin maxay ahayd sababta uu tigidh cusub oo bas u raadinayey?

lesson.text: To get another bus. He needed another bus so he could get to the summer camp. They walked together to the ticket counter, where he explained his destination to the friendly clerk. With his new ticket in hand, Tommy felt a surge of excitement, ready to embrace the adventures that awaited him at camp. Was he successful in getting a new bus ticket?

translations.Somali: Si uu u raaco bas kale. Wuxuu u baahnaa bas kale si uu u tago xero xagaaga. Waxay wada socdeen ilaa kaarka tigidhada, halkaas oo uu u sharxay meesha uu ku wajahnaa kaaliyaha saaxiibtinimada leh. Tigidhkiisii cusub oo gacantiisa ku jira, Tommy wuxuu dareemay farxad weyn, isagoo diyaar u ah inuu qaabilo tacaburrada ku sugeysa xerada. Ma ku guuleystay inuu helo tigidh cusub oo bas?

lesson.text: Yes, he was. He got a new ticket. He explained everything to the friendly clerk and he was now excited to resume his journey.

translations.Somali: Haa, wuu ku guuleystay. Wuxuu helay tigidh cusub. Wuxuu wax walba u sharxay kaaliyaha saaxiibtinimada leh, wuxuuna hadda ku faraxsanaa inuu dib u bilaabo safarkiisa.
